question: Will I have a generally favorable opinion of Elon Musk on June 1, 2026?
reason: Musk's recent focus on space and technology projects suggests a positive shift in his public image.
evidence: Musk announced the 'TeraFab' semiconductor project, aiming to produce a terawatt of annual compute power, indicating a significant investment in technological advancement. ([tomshardware.com](https://www.tomshardware.com/tech-industry/elon-musk-formally-launches-20-billion-terafab-chip-project?utm_source=openai))

SpaceX successfully launched its Starship Version 3 rocket, the most powerful to date, marking progress in space exploration. ([space.com](https://www.space.com/space-exploration/launches-spacecraft/spacex-starship-v3-megarocket-first-test-flight?utm_source=openai))

Musk declared himself 'CEO for life' of SpaceX, signaling strong leadership and commitment to the company's future. ([axios.com](https://www.axios.com/2026/05/21/musk-ceo-spacex-control?utm_source=openai))
